purpose: Future runtime authorization gate after exact Archer Attack approval. This record does not authorize runtime work now.
preconditionsAllRequired: Neutral Master approved and exact SHA locked
Idle exact package approved and hashes locked
Move exact package approved and hashes locked
Attack exact package approved by explicit user decision and hashes locked
no source drift across all approved inputs
complete Archer motion handoff contains exact paths, hashes, FPS, loop semantics, rootMotion, anchors, markers, runtimeFlipX, transition notes, review concerns, and rollback plan
runtimeExecutionRules: reuse technical motion pipeline from PR #56 as a read-only technical baseline
avoid framework rewrite unless a demonstrated blocker requires separately reviewed scope
integrate only exact approved Idle/Move/Attack package bytes
map approved Attack releaseCue to projectile timing without altering approved Attack art
validate Idle -> Attack -> Idle and Move -> Attack transitions

checkpoints.name: Asset Load + State Registration
checks: exact Idle/Move/Attack packages load under correct hero.archer states
no stale or legacy texture binding

checkpoints.name: Playback + Transition + Anchor Stability
checks: Attack plays once at approved 12 FPS/non-loop semantics
no root drift, crop, scale pop, anchor jump, stale frame, or obvious transition pop

checkpoints.name: Marker + Projectile Timing + Regression
checks: Move footsteps remain isolated to approved frames 002 and 006
Attack releaseCue fires exactly once at the approved frame per playback
projectile release timing consumes releaseCue without changing approved Attack art
targeted Combat/gameplay regression remains functional at x4

rollback.rule: Runtime integration must be reversible to the immediately prior approved runtime mapping without modifying approved Neutral/Idle/Move/Attack bytes.

authorizationRule: Set authorizedNow=true only in a later scoped record after explicit Attack exact-file approval and all preconditions pass.
